CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-18-2026 Off Calendar

Notice Of Unopposed Motion And Motion For Entry Of [Proposed] Final Judgment On Consent For Permanent Injunction And Civil Penalties; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities
Off Calendar Jan-09-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

1 - The People's unopposed Motion And Motion For Entry Of [Proposed] Final Judgment On Consent For Permanent Injunction And Civil Penalties is GRANTED.

The requirements of Code of Civil Procedures sections 664.6 being satisfied and good cause appearing, the court grants the People's motion for entry of [proposed] final judgment on consent for permanent injunction and civil penalties.

The court will execute the [proposed] final judgment submitted by the People with their moving papers.

Prior to the time set for hearing, the People shall lodge by email to contestdept302tr@sftc.org a proposed order containing the above text verbatim.

The Court signs order and judgment.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)

MOTION TO ADMIT COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE
Off Calendar Jan-09-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

2 - Defendants' unopposed Motion to Admit Pro Hac Vice Counsel Richard W. Smith is GRANTED.

Good cause appearing, counsel Richard W. Smith may appear as counsel pro hac vice for Moving Parties in this action.

Order is signed.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)
